g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_W_Tutorial_EquipWeapon__316
g.text: SourceString = All classes are equipped with both a primary and a secondary weapon. Your current <bold>loadout</> can be seen in the <bold>Status</> tab of the <MenuButton/> menu.Press <equip1/> to equip <bold>Primary Weapon</>Press <equip2/> to equip <bold>Secondary Weapon</>
